positive: A majestic, geometric mountain range silhouette rising against a deep cosmic night sky. The style is highly refined graphic design, inspired by Mid-Century Modern and Art Deco aesthetics. The composition must be perfectly centered and symmetrical, featuring clean, razor-sharp silhouettes of varied peaks and layered celestial elements, such as stylized crescent moons and constellations. Use a highly restricted, contrasting color palette of deep indigo blue, matte burnt orange, and cream off-white. The scene should have a luxurious, illustrative quality, suitable for a wearable art print, emphasizing clean lines, strong contrast, and a central focus. --ar 1:1
negative: text, watermark, signature, logo, messy, noisy, blurry, grainy, low resolution, extra limbs, bad anatomy, deformed, out of frame, poorly rendered
